item.title: AMD Ryzen AI Embedded P100 series expands with up to 12 Zen 5 cores, 80 TOPS of AI performance

probe.title: AMD Ryzen AI Embedded P100 series expands with up to 12 Zen 5 cores, 80 TOPS of AI performance - CNX Software
probe.description: AMD expands the Ryzen AI Embedded P100 series with additional 8-/12-core SKUs (P164, P174, P185) delivering up to 80 TOPS of AI performance.
